title: RegistryEntry
description: One entry in ~/.generacy/clusters.json. Backward-compatible with v1 — new fields are optional.

clusterId.description: Cloud-minted UUID. Nullable for entries created before activation completed.

name.description: Legacy field — retained for backward compat. New writers also set displayName.

displayName.description: Normalized cluster display name. Source of truth for the cluster's human identity.

projectId.description: Cloud-minted project ID. Required for new writes; absent in older entries.

deploymentMode.description: Local (docker on this host) vs. cloud (SSH-deployed). Missing values treated as 'local'.
